title: G-Craft
description: A lightweight optimisation and QoL modpack to enjoy Minecraft.
body:
![G-Craft  -  Simple and Hasle-free](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b70f286daa02cfc0a35490b3370df209cfb34fb.png)



A simple Minecraft modpack with 6 simple goals :

1. Lightweight 

2. Low risk of ban

3. All OS compatible 

4. Easy to use

5. Frequent updates

6. Simple but useful Quality of Life features
